utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. In the final solution, the items present are: selected_property (maps to property), financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, coordination_package (extra, not in required format), and total_budget. Now check if each of the 6 required items is fully specified with details.
- property: Present as selected_property. Includes description, price, bedroom configuration, and features. This satisfies 'selected property with details and price'. Fully specified.
- financing: Present with two options, each having down payment, arrangement fee, and estimated monthly payment. This satisfies 'financing solution with terms'. Fully specified.
- legal_services: Present with basic legal package cost, full structural survey, and total legal cost. Costs are given. Fully specified.
- moving_services: Present with standard_moving cost. Costs provided, arrangement indicated. Fully specified.
- setup_services: Present with premium_utilities_setup cost. Utilities/setup indicated. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Present with breakdown lines: purchase price, down payment options, arrangement fee options, legal/admin, moving/setup, coordination one-time fees, ongoing coordination. While it includes an extra coordination line, the required total budget is present and itemized. Fully specified.
All 6 required items appear and are sufficiently detailed according to the format.
